title: $LENGTH_RAW_IN_BYTES
text: $LENGTH_RAW_IN_BYTES Specify if function $length returns the length in bytes or characters for arguments with datatype Raw. $LENGTH_RAW_IN_BYTES{=} 1 | 0 Defaults Table 1. Assignment file: Any application assignment file Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: 0 Description Use $LENGTH_RAW_IN_BYTES to differentiate between the byte length and character length for raw data when using $length . If $LENGTH_RAW_IN_BYTES = 0 or is omitted, $length returns the character length for raw data. If $LENGTH_RAW_IN_BYTES = 1 , $length returns the byte length for raw data. Was this topic helpful?
